ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "code" TEXT /* Stock code (e.g., sh.000149) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock listed on the exchange */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_listings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_listings_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total trading amount of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company profile */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the company profile belongs to */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_profiles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the financial statement belongs to */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., income statement, balance sheet) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the financial statement (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the market data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "pct_chg" REAL /* Percentage change of the stock price */,
  "pe_ttm" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio (TTM) */,
  "pb_mrq" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio (MRQ) */,
  "ps_ttm" REAL /* Price-to-sales ratio (TTM) */,
  "pcf_ncf_ttm" REAL /* Price-to-cash flow ratio (TTM) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_halts" (
  "halt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading halt record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the trading halt belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading halt */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading halt */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading halt */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the trading halt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("halt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_halts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings announcement record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the earnings announcement belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the earnings announcement */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the earnings announcement */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "guidance" TEXT /* Guidance provided by the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_announcements_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the permission belongs to */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Read permission for the user */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Write permission for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price movement, earning announcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the rating belongs to */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who made the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating made by the analyst (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
